message:
Merge PR #2532: use rig root for beads queries in prime hook lookup

Polecat worktrees can fail to resolve .beads/redirect, causing polecats
to miss hooked work. Use the rig root directory which always has the
authoritative .beads/ database. (GH#2503)

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2532
Author: rexgnu (Gabriel Ledung)

Co-Authored-By: Gabriel Ledung <rexgnu@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
